purpose: Generate a structured evidence bundle summarizing search results, selected sources, prompts, outputs, and review artifacts for research and planning workflows.

endpoints.description: Generate a normalized evidence bundle object from a research or planning run.

sidecar_specification.purpose: Structured evidence bundle generator for research and planning workflows.

agent_usage.when_to_use: Use at the end of a research or planning run when the workflow needs a portable record of what evidence supported the output.
agent_usage.when_not_to_use: Do not use as a search engine, citation validator, or long-term storage backend by itself.
agent_usage.example_workflow: 1) Collect research sources, output artifacts, and reviewer notes. 2) Call /research/evidence-bundles. 3) Store the returned bundle alongside the run manifest.

common_calls.description: Generate an evidence bundle for a planning run

failure_modes.condition: Sources or artifacts are missing required metadata
failure_modes.recovery: Normalize and enrich source metadata before bundle generation

forbidden_behaviors.description: Must not write outside declared scope
Must not make external network calls

agent_notes.implementation_hint: Generate one canonical bundle object containing request metadata, sources, artifacts, reviews, and derived summary counts. Keep field names stable for downstream consumers.
agent_notes.known_gotchas: Evidence artifacts often mix URLs, local paths, and free text notes. Normalization matters if the bundle will be validated later by another system.
agent_notes.preferred_approach: Model sources and artifacts explicitly and include enough metadata for later audit without duplicating the full source content.
agent_notes.avoid_approach: Do not scrape sources inside this module and do not silently discard incomplete evidence entries.
